title: Lights — house repair + Vietnam-prep packing list, Aug 2022
html:
TL;DR

  • A pre-departure checklist before Yahir's first solo trip to Vietnam (Aug–Sep 2022): house-repair items (mold in bathrooms, busted outlets, can-we-put-up-the-cost-hangar), then a tight packing list — phone, port[able battery], chargers, AirPods, head rest at mom's, rain jackets, "Hellas socks," 3 shorts, pants, 2 short sleeves, 2 long sleeves, contacts, glasses, manual toothbrush, hat, fanny pack, journal, passport, "print out visa at beaver store" (i.e. at osu Beaver Store).
  • Buy-now mini-list: AirTag battery, socks, strap bag.
  • Closing: transport-research line items — "Hanoi to Sapa: 6 hours (direct, $12–18)" and "Sapa to Ha Giang: 7 hours (direct)" — the very first Vietnam-route prep that turns into the 2022 07 31 vietnam route prep full itinerary and then 2022 09 08 thienkung cave vietnam event-log.
  • Mid-list crossouts (✅): mom's phone dialed in, organizers for bathroom — proof the list was actually executed.

Key items

"Print out visa at beaver store"

"Hanoi to Sapa: 6 hours (direct, $12–18)"

Why it matters in the graph

  • One of three Vietnam-prep notes (2022 07 31 vietnam route prep + 2022 08 16 lights + 2022 09 08 thienkung cave vietnam) — together they form Yahir's pre-departure-checklist→trip-log pipeline.
  • "Print visa at beaver store" links the osu campus to Yahir's international travel logistics — these notes capture the very specific friction of being a small-town college student trying to do a solo Asia trip.
  • Mom's-phone task → adjacent to the 2022 06 14 being then experience that comes from being mom-house-by-the-river goal.

Open questions

  • "Hellas socks" — special / branded? Worth tracking if a recurring item.
  • Did the cost-hangar ever get put up?
